prompt: Create a highly stylized anime-style cinematic portrait of a handsome male celebrity, reimagined as a breathtakingly beautiful anime character in a romantic spring scene. Horizontal 16:9 composition, close-up bust portrait from the chest up, character centered slightly right, shoulders angled, head turned gently toward the viewer. He has voluminous wind-swept medium-length warm brown hair with many loose strands flying leftward, a slim elegant neck, soft peachy glowing skin, refined jawline, and classic shoujo-anime facial beauty with large sparkling doe eyes, delicate nose, and gentle lips. Dress him in a dark navy-black blazer over a black crew-neck shirt, polished but casual. Background is an ethereal cherry blossom avenue at golden hour with pink sakura trees on both sides, dreamy blue-lavender sky, warm peach sunlight, soft bokeh sparkles, and exactly 12 clearly visible floating cherry blossom petals of varied sizes across the foreground and midground. Visual style: ultra-detailed anime illustration, romantic shoujo fantasy, luminous rim lighting on hair and shoulders, soft painterly gradients, glossy highlights, high contrast between dark clothing and pastel blossoms, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, delicate atmospheric glow, no text, no watermark, no border.
